title: Fungi genetic legacy
description: We gathered strongest spores. Next generation of mushrooms on a new place will grow stronger than ever.
hint: If we grow mature shrooms we will be able to take the strongest spores to a new place...

title: The end
description:
The world did not fall to nanobots. Not to quantum ruptures. Not to uncontrolled genetic engineering. And not to reality-shattering spells.

It fell to all of them at once.

A war of everyone against everyone transformed the world into a shattered wasteland where monsters roam among the ruins of forgotten civilizations.

title: The new begining
description:
A small group of survivors struggles to endure in the ruins of the old world.

You have found a relatively safe place and established a crude settlement. But safety never lasts for long.

The growing settlement has attracted the attention of nearby monsters.

Build your first defense tower and hold them back.

title: Back to medieval
description:
Some people rejected the ways of the old world.

They chose a simpler life, relying on wood, stone, and the strength of human hands.

While others searched for forgotten technologies, ancient magic, or new forms of life, these settlers sought to reclaim the world one piece at a time.

Clear the wilderness. Expand your settlement. Bring civilization back to the ruins.
hint: What if we gather some tools and wood...

title: First siege is over
description:
A brief moment of peace.

The first wave has been repelled.

There will be more.

But not today.

For now, the city has earned a little time.

Build shelters. Gather resources. Strengthen your defenses.

And try not to draw too much attention.

Or at least... not before you're ready.

title: Path of life
description:
Some people chose a different path.

Instead of rebuilding the old world, they learned to become part of the new one.

Listen to the whispers of the trees. Feel the endless mycelium spreading beneath your feet. Walk among creatures shaped by centuries of mutation and change.

Nature endured when empires fell.

Befriend the wild. Guide its growth. Claim the world as your own.
hint: What if we try to use mutated flora and fauna...

title: Village
description: Few houses more. You starting to attract attention.

title: Power of man
description:
Your empire has grown vast and strong.

The wilderness has been reclaimed. Roads are safe once more. Borders are watched day and night.

Far from the frontier, people have begun to forget what it means to carry a sword.

Service on the border is no longer a duty. It has become a profession, rewarded with gold instead of necessity.

In a world where life was cheap and only strength endured, you carved out a place where ordinary people could simply live.

A sanctuary.

Will it endure?

Or will plague, forgotten magic, or the relics of the old world one day bring it to ruin?

Only time will answer.

For now, those who dream of another path may leave the safety of the Empire.

Beyond the frontier, the wilderness still awaits.
hint: What if we build more cities an gather lots of people and gold...
